intro: Alpinia officinarum decoction, also known as galangal decoction, is a traditional herbal remedy derived from the rhizomes of the Alpinia officinarum plant. This decoction has been used in various cultures, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its digestive and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its potential to aid in cold and flu relief. When consumed as a decoction, the active compounds in galangal, such as gingerols and shogaols, may help to soothe the digestive system and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory infections.
